headline: Why The Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Story Is Shifting With New Policy And Valuation Views
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland’s fair value estimate has been updated to about US$63.82 from roughly US$62.09, a modest shift that puts fresh attention on how analysts are recalibrating expectations. Several firms are pairing this with higher price targets, such as moves to US$68 from US$61 and JPMorgan’s US$4 increase, as they weigh policy support, commodity trends, and a mixed sector backdrop. Read on to see how to track these changing views and what to watch as the story continues to evolve. Stay...

headline: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
summary: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

headline: FMC Secures EU Nod for Isoflex Active Herbicide Market Expansion
summary: FMC wins EU approval for Isoflex herbicide, unlocking access to more than 55 million hectares in a market lacking new crop protection solutions.

raw.headline: FMC Secures EU Nod for Isoflex Active Herbicide Market Expansion
raw.summary: FMC wins EU approval for Isoflex herbicide, unlocking access to more than 55 million hectares in a market lacking new crop protection solutions.

headline: How The Admiral Group (LSE:ADM) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: Admiral Group’s analyst fair value estimate has shifted from £32.60 to £33.23, putting a fresh spotlight on where recent Street price targets are clustering. That change is arriving alongside a split in opinion, with some analysts pointing to price targets in the £35 range and others closer to £27 to £29 as they reassess UK motor pricing and earnings risk. In the following sections, you will see how to read these moves and keep track of the evolving narrative around Admiral’s valuation...
